items.q: The character Star-Lord appears in E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial.
items.explanation: Star-Lord appears in Guardians of the Galaxy, not E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Furiosa.
items.explanation: Furiosa is strongly linked to Mad Max: Fury Road.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Stephen Strange.
items.explanation: Stephen Strange is strongly linked to Doctor Strange.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie The Matrix?
items.explanation: Neo is one of the defining characters in The Matrix.

items.q: Which movie features the character Batman?
items.explanation: Batman is associated with The Dark Knight.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie Ghostbusters?
items.explanation: Peter Venkman is one of the defining characters in Ghostbusters.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie Jurassic Park?
items.explanation: Alan Grant is one of the defining characters in Jurassic Park.

items.q: The character Jack Dawson appears in Titanic.
items.explanation: Jack Dawson is a key character in Titanic.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Aladdin.
items.explanation: Aladdin is strongly linked to Aladdin.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Frodo Baggins.
items.a: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
items.explanation: Frodo Baggins is strongly linked to The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring.
